name: Integration Design with DDD (Polish Dreamin'26)
description: Holder of this badge attended and completed Integration Design with DDD by BridgingTheGap.eu.com at Polish Dreamin'26.

criteria.narrative: This badge confirms active engagement in our “Integration Design with DDD” workshop. Earners attended the live session, collaborated on group exercises. It signifies applied understanding of Domain-Driven Design strategic tools for application integration and a commitment to professional development.
